# Elena Wang

> Product marketing and GTM leader bridging technical capability and distribution strategy — building with AI tools, shipping products, and driving adoption and growth.

- Website: https://elenahw.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/elenawang
- X: https://x.com/Elena_H_W
- GitHub: https://github.com/elena-h-w

## About

Elena Wang is a product marketing and GTM leader focused on driving adoption and revenue growth for technology platforms. She builds and ships her own apps from concept to production and has launched mobile app on the App Store and Google Play.

## Products

- Waylena (https://waylena.com) — Mobile networking tracker app for professionals to log career conversations and follow up. Available on App Store and Google Play.
- Impact Logger (https://impactlogger.vercel.app) — AI-powered web app for professionals to track their impact and generate narratives for performance reviews, promotions, role changes, and resumes.
- Back on Track (https://return-to-running.vercel.app) — Return-to-running web app combining a PT strength routine with a structured walk/jog progression program.

## Writing

- What Building Three Apps Taught Me That I Didn't Expect (https://elenahw.com/writing/what-building-three-apps-taught-me) — April 27, 2026
- When a Ski Trip Injury Led Me to Build Two Products in Eight Weeks (https://elenahw.com/writing/build-two-products-in-eight-weeks) — March 19, 2026
